title: Open a turn
text: At the start of a turn, draw exactly one lantern card, place it face up in the active row, and announce its color before taking another action.

citations.quote: At the start of a turn, draw exactly one lantern card, place it face up in the active row, and announce its color before taking another action.

required_actions: Place the card face up in the active row.
Announce the card's color before taking another action.
forbidden_actions: Take another action before announcing the lantern color.

title: Spend recorded light
text: To spend light, cross out the chosen number of light marks in the ledger before moving a piece. A player may not spend more light than the ledger currently records.

citations.quote: To spend light, cross out the chosen number of light marks in the ledger before moving a piece. A player may not spend more light than the ledger currently records.

conditions: A player chooses an action that costs light.
required_actions: Cross out the chosen number of light marks before moving a piece.
forbidden_actions: Spend more light than the ledger records.
Move a piece before recording the light cost.
procedure_steps: Choose the amount of light to spend.
Confirm the ledger records at least that amount.

title: Resolve an Echo card
text: When the drawn lantern card is marked Echo, announce its color as usual, return the card to the bottom of the lantern deck, and do not place it in the active row.

citations.quote: When the drawn lantern card is marked Echo, announce its color as usual, return the card to the bottom of the lantern deck, and do not place it in the active row.

conditions: The drawn lantern card is marked Echo.
required_actions: Return the Echo card to the bottom of the lantern deck.
forbidden_actions: Place an Echo card in the active row.
procedure_steps: Return the card to the bottom of the deck.
exceptions: An Echo card is returned to the deck instead of entering the active row.
